channel.title: Dropbox on Nathan Vaughn
channel.description: Recent content in Dropbox on Nathan Vaughn

item.title: Google Drive Isn't a Very Good Product
item.description: Background To start off with, I’m incredibly invested in the Google ecosystem. My Gmail account is my main email account. I love Google Photos. I live by my Google Calendar. I use Google Keep extensively for making lists. I use Google Pixel phones. I register all of my domain names through Google Domains. You get the idea. So why don’t I use Google Drive? Because it’s just not that great…
